answers.question: What are the specific property maintenance requirements for residents regarding yard and landscape conditions?
Are there exceptions in the property maintenance code to allow for cultivated pollinator garddens?
What are the penalties/fees for failing to comply with property maintenance regulations?
answers.answer: If a property owner fails to comply with property maintenance regulations, the penalties/fees include the cost of the cleanup plus an administrative fee of 20%. This total cost will become a lien against the property in the same manner as Town taxes. (§ 221-2)

answers.question: What is the timeline for resolving a property maintenance violation before penalties are applied?
answers.answer: The timeline for resolving a property maintenance violation before penalties are applied is 10 days following the receipt of the notice. (§ 221-2)

answers.question: Does the property maintenance law go beyond the property lot lines (such as to the curb)?
